title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: os-prober bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for os-prober is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The os-prober package detects all operating systems available on the machine and returns the results in a generic machine-readable format. Support for the new operating systems and Linux distributions can be added.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): os-prober generates broken snippets for alternate root file systems [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-55234)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
full_text:
An update for os-prober is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The os-prober package detects all operating systems available on the machine and returns the results in a generic machine-readable format. Support for the new operating systems and Linux distributions can be added.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): os-prober generates broken snippets for alternate root file systems [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-55234)
